text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm taking a stroll through the
streets...

text_block_list.name: Figure in Black A
text_block_list.text: ...Over here. Hurry.

text_block_list.name: Woman in Tuxedo
text_block_list.text:
Ladies and gentlemen! I cordially welcome you to
our casino tournament! The stakes—nothing but
your dignity as a high roller! Compete to your
heart's content, for today and today only! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, for cryin' out loud. I thought I saw a fish outta
water, and here you are again.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Before you get any funny ideas, this tournament
is completely legit, all right? Despite the
unregistered busybodies stickin' their noses in.

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text:
Pssst! Look, it's her...
The legendary dealer—the Angel of the Night!
Oh, I can't believe I get to see her in person!
choice_data_list: Isn't that the woman we ran into by the river?

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my. Who do we have here? Hehe. Long time
no see.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: ...Well, well, well. Looks like Your Holiness is pretty popular.

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, and I've chosen you as my opponent.
What do you say? Care to put your pride on the
line?

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: No way! An opponent handpicked by the Angel herself? Who is that? Snicker. Nobody beats the Angel...

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text:
The name of the game is roulette. You lay down
your chips, and I'll spin the wheel. We'll decide
this with a single round, nice and simple.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Don't suppose there's any issue with betting on a
color rather than a number?

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. Take your pick, black or red.
All right, time to spin the wheel.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Angel throws the white roulette ball onto the
spinning wheel. It makes a strangely satisfying
sound as it rolls, and the throng of bystanders
watch with sweaty palms and bated breath.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Do you remember when we talked about habits?
choice_data_list: You mean like with Special Week?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Competition sets your body into a
combative state, no matter who you're facing.
That's why habits develop without one's
knowledge.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
For example, when the Angel here's aimin' for a
specific pocket, she has a habit of rollin' the ball
to a certain rhythm.

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
choice_data_list: Can you really tell something like that?
Can you really tell something like that?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
It helps that a dealer as well-known as she has an
extensive amount of material to study.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Plus, as someone who lives and breathes the
races, I've developed an internal clock to count
my laps. If I combine that with what I know about
the Angel's habits...

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text: Th-that's enough! Let's start over.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The game comes to a sudden halt. They decide to
resume the match after a short breather.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Are you worried that you might've ruined my
plan? Haha... Not to worry.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I was just bluffing when I said all that stuff about
her habits.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
And did you see how flustered she looked? It
paid off in spades. With this, she now knows that
underhanded tricks won't work.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's do this. No more tricks, just a bona
fide test of luck.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
...I bet on black. Who wants to bet on the Angel
goin' down?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing that, the Angel of the Night quickly
proclaims that bets are closed. Soon after, the
white roulette ball goes rolling and rolling, until...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd goes wild. The ball has landed in a
black pocket. Which means... Nakayama Festa
has won.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the real commotion comes after the game,
when everyone realizes that she has disappeared
from the premises without playing anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Days later, I spot Nakayama Festa at the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you. Sorry to leave you in the thick of it
the other day, but ya can't blame anyone for
wantin' to get away from all that commotion.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't after fame, after all. I just wanted a
challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I notice there's a bus parked up ahead of her.
Come to think of it, the morning news said that
she's racing today.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Heh, so you've heard. Well...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Hey, black or white. Which do ya wanna bet on?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Haha... Yeah, me too. All right, see ya around.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get the feeling that she can overtake any racer
and claim victory today.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Hey, black or white. Which do ya wanna bet on?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Don't push yourself to answer. It's normal to
waffle.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I'd bet on white, though. No matter who my
opponent is, I'll overtake them. See ya around.
